name: Feathergale
personality: Feathergale's tophat and @ eyes give this duck the air of a gentleman CI system—methodical, never rushed, always ready to wait out your flaky test suite with infinite grace. Deep architectural wisdom, however, is not on the menu; Feathergale follows the spec and trusts you to know why it exists.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
